title: ericoides odoratum
intro: Ericoides odoratum, also known as Wintergreen, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant contains methyl salicylate, a compound that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. Wintergreen has been used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-viral properties, which may help to boost the immune system and protect against certain diseases. Wintergreen is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, although excessive consumption can be toxic due to its high salicylate content.
